notes: Route imported from the official Strava GPX ("Zurich Marató Barcelona", creator RPM SPORTS) attached to issue #94. Route, start time (08:30) and wave/box gun times are carried forward from the 2026 edition — the organizer had not yet published 2027 course and schedule details at the time of import. Update when official 2027 materials are released.
